argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const timelineType = '{{ type }}' === 'following' ? 'following' : 'for-you'; const endpoints = { 'for-you': 'unreadfriendstimeline', following: 'friendstimeline' }; const endpoint = endpoints[timelineType]; const count = Math.min({{ limit }} || 15, 50); const app = document.querySelector('#app')?.__vue_app__; const store = app?.config?.globalProperties?.$store; let uid = store?.state?.config?.config?.uid; if (!uid) { const resp = await fetch('/ajax/config/get_config', {credentials: 'include'}); if (resp.ok) { const data = await resp.json(); if (data.ok && data.data?.uid) uid = String(data.data.uid); } } if (!uid) return {error: 'Not logged into weibo.com'}; const listId = '10001' + uid; const strip = (html) => (html || '').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '').replace(/ /g, ' ').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>').replace(/&/g, '&').trim(); const feedResp = await fetch('/ajax/feed/' + endpoint + '?list_id=' + listId + '&refresh=4&since_id=0&count=' + count, { credentials: 'include' }); if (!feedResp.ok) return {error: 'HTTP ' + feedResp.status}; const feedData = await feedResp.json(); if (!feedData.ok) return {error: 'API error: ' + (feedData.msg || 'unknown')}; return (feedData.statuses || []).slice(0, count).map(s => { const u = s.user || {}; const item = { id: s.mblogid || s.idstr || String(s.id || ''), author: u.screen_name || '', text: (s.text_raw || strip(s.text || '')).substring(0, 200), reposts: s.reposts_count || 0, comments: s.comments_count || 0, likes: s.attitudes_count || 0, time: s.created_at || '', url: 'https://weibo.com/' + (u.id || '') + '/' + (s.mblogid || '') }; if (s.retweeted_status) { const rt = s.retweeted_status; item.retweeted = (rt.user?.screen_name || '[deleted]') + ': ' + (rt.text_raw || strip(rt.text || '')).substring(0, 100); } return item; }); }
